original_image_tags: Faint, partially visible stamped text at the bottom of the page, appearing to read "FOUR STAR BOND" and "SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA".

elements.description: A typed letter page containing seven paragraphs of text, a closing, and a signature. The text discusses unidentified objects, planetary ages, and the author's background. The closing reads 'Very truly yours,' followed by a handwritten signature 'W. B. Burgess' and the typed name 'W. B. Burgess' below it. At the bottom of the page, there is a faint watermark visible through the paper, partially legible as 'FOUR STAR BOND' and 'SOUTHWORTH CO. USA'.

judge.reason: Description A claims a stamped text reads 'SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA' while Description B quotes the same area as 'SOUTHWORTH CO. USA', which is a direct contradiction on specific verbatim text.
